mouth_pose: tongue tip gently gripped between closed front teeth with only a tiny portion of the tongue peeking out between the incisors, upper and lower teeth clamping down on the middle of the tongue, mouth mostly closed, NOT a raspberry tongue-out face, NOT a sticking-out tongue past the teeth
sound_gesture: thumbs-up paw held forward, other paw on hip, bouncing playfully
word_decor: small lightning-bolt shaped horns on the head
expression: cheeky bright eyes, eyebrows tilted, mischievous mood

voice.character_description: bright playful child voice with slight lisp, mischievous cadence

clips.greet: Thhh! Show me if you can make my sound!
clips.encourage: Nice! Feel the air on your tongue?
clips.gentle_retry: Keep the tongue out. Try again.
clips.friday_acknowledge: Perfect! Now I am yours, friend.
